“Azra?” you call to the golden suula, unable to resist smiling after talking to the girl you fucked silly not so long ago.

\n\nAzra jumps at your voice, then steadies herself with a deep breath. Calmness restored, she smiles back. It isn’t as gleeful as your own. She seems worried. “Captain, the samples are stored and growing wonderfully. Thanks to you, I obtained a large enough set to offer you an early harvest, should you wish to test their purported effects firsthand.”
\n\nYou fold your arms and give her a knowing look. “What about yesterday?”

\n\nThe suula’s wings droop, and she flinches. “Yesterday was... a bit, perhaps. Fun, yes - wonderful even. It was an encounter I’ll treasure till the end of my days, Captain. But as we discussed, we are too busy for idle salaciousness. If we indulge our baser urges...” Azra colors a deep orange, then clears her throat, starting over. “I certainly would not get anything done. How am I supposed to pursue my work if I’m pursuing you?” She sags down, ashamed by her own admission. Hair the color of a fading sunset hides her features.
\n\nYou brush her hair back and lay your hand on her cheek. What do you tell her?
